name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions: Arrange the sliced bananas in the pastry shell. Combine the sugar, cornstarch (2 teaspoons), and salt in a heavy saucepan; stir well. Combine the egg yolks and milk; gradually stir into the sugar mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils. Boil 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat; stir in butter and vanilla. Immediately pour into the pastry shell over the sliced bananas. Cover the filling with wax paper. Let cool for 30 minutes; then chill until firm. Beat the whipping cream until foamy; gradually add the powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form. Spread the whipped cream over the filling. Chill. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
